title: ToggleChat
description: A Forge mod for 1.8.9 that allows you to toggle various chats with the click of a button
body:
### Introduction
> A breif introduction

A Forge mod for 1.8.9 that allows you to filter various chat messages with the click of a button. 

The majority of the built in toggles are for Hypixel, however in newer versions users are able to define their own filters.

**TLDR:** This mod lets you filter out chat messages you don't want to see.

---

### Commands
> How to use the mod

* /togglechat
* /chattoggle
* /tc

----

### Credits
> Those who helped make this possible

* 2Pi for the original idea, and for making one of the first "ChatToggler" mods.
* tterrag1098 for the initial implementation of the BlurMC mod.
